author: lOrm
content:
Fixed in src/providers/anthropic.rs.

CHANGES:
1. transform_request: tool conversion now goes through new fallible convert_tools_checked(); a tool missing function or function.name returns ProviderError::RequestFailed naming the field and index, never silently dropped.
2. transform_response: removed all three sentinels (msg_unknown / unknown / 0 for required fields). Missing id, model, stop_reason, or content array now returns ProviderError::InvalidResponse with the specific field name. Malformed text/tool_use content blocks also error with index + field name. Usage missing remains 0/0 but DEBUG-logged (only optional field).
3. Walking content blocks is extracted into walk_content_blocks / extract_text_block / extract_tool_use_block helpers — each block-level failure surfaces with index and reason. All error paths emit tracing::warn!("... (crosslink #413)") with the offending payload for forensic traceability.
4. The infallible convert_tools(...) wrapper preserved for trusted internal callers logs WARN on dropped tools rather than dropping silently.

TESTS (8 new, in src/providers/anthropic.rs #[cfg(test)] mod tests):
- transform_request_errors_on_tool_missing_function_name
- transform_request_errors_on_tool_missing_function_object   (asserts index 1)
- transform_request_errors_on_tool_with_empty_function_name
- transform_response_errors_on_empty_object_no_sentinels      (the {} case mandated by item 4)
- transform_response_errors_on_missing_model_no_sentinel       (asserts no 'unknown' leak)
- transform_response_errors_on_tool_use_block_missing_name
- transform_response_happy_path_still_works                    (regression guard)
- convert_tools_checked_errors_on_malformed_input

VERIFICATION:
- cargo test --lib -p openclaudia: 1334 passed, 0 failed (baseline was 1314)
- cargo clippy --lib -p openclaudia -- -D warnings: exit 0
- No #[allow], no clippy.toml change, no #[ignore].
